name: 暗影双匕（★） | 澄澈之水
nameZh: 暗影双匕（★） | 澄澈之水
descriptionEn: Designed for efficient brutality, using a push dagger is as simple as throwing a punch or two. It has been painted using a blue camo hydrographic. Ours is a world of intrigue...but sometimes camouflage is meant to be seen - Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptionZh: 专为高效行凶设计，手推短匕用起来就和挥一两记重拳一样简单。 这把武器蓝色迷彩花纹进行了涂装。 我们的世界充满了阴谋暗算… 但有时用作伪装的迷彩就是拿来炫的 - 军火商布兹
